conventions.nav_basis: daily strategy NAV series produced by the harness backtest, net of modeled transaction costs
conventions.return_definition: daily log returns r_t = ln(NAV_t / NAV_{t-1})

annualized_volatility.definition: sigma_annual = stdev(r_t over evaluation window, sample) * sqrt(252)
annualized_volatility.window_rule: computed per evaluation window (full period, each walk-forward fold, each stress window)

max_drawdown.definition: MDD = max over t of (peak_t - NAV_t) / peak_t, where peak_t = max(NAV_s for s <= t)
max_drawdown.window_rule: computed per evaluation window; stress windows use window-local peak

out_of_sample_stability.definition: walk-forward folds per stress_oos_policy.json; per fold report {return_annualized, sigma_annual, MDD, one_way_turnover_annualized}; stability metric = max absolute deviation of each fold metric from the cross-fold median
out_of_sample_stability.window_rule: folds defined in stress_oos_policy.json; no fold may breach the profile thresholds

stress_window_behavior.definition: per named stress window report {window_return, window_MDD, worst_5d_return, decision_coverage}; decision_coverage = fraction of scheduled decision dates with a valid quadrant decision (no NaN, no missing inputs beyond coverage policy)

turnover.definition: one_way_turnover_rebalance = 0.5 * sum_i |w_i,t_post - w_i,t_pre|; one_way_turnover_annualized = sum of one_way_turnover_rebalance over trailing 252 trading days
turnover.explicit_prohibition: turnover_proxy (baseline_distance from calibration metrics_manifest.json) is NOT turnover and MUST NOT be used as turnover evidence

strategy_design_bounds.note: Design-level upper bounds derived from the calibration parameter grid (growth/inflation weight probes of +/-2pp and risk_tilt of +/-1pp around the 50/50 baseline); used to sanity-check thresholds, not as evidence
strategy_design_bounds.rebalance_frequency_assumption: monthly decision cadence with quadrant-flip-driven reallocations
